title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Testbook Capital India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Testbook Capital India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Testbook Capital India family as a Curriculum Developer in Visakhapatnam. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Testbook Capital India:
Testbook Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Special Education

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Testbook Capital India!
